0.title: GlobalPartitionCount

1.title: GlobalPartitionCount Sum
1.query:
/*
Warning:
 - Rollup `value` is not supported in DQL.
*/
timeseries global_partition_count_sum = avg(cloud.aws.kafka.global_partition_count_sum), by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| sort arrayAvg(global_partition_count_sum) desc
| limit 20
